title: Lightning Mace
description: Lightning Mace that attacks enemies with lightnings as like Mjolnir.
body:
This datapack allows you to create a **Lightning Mace**.

![Here's the Lightning Mace craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d082ca9033de100d9d77892bc27e5fcf9cf78b9f.png)

**_When it's storming, with some chance your mace can be charged with 5 charges._**

When you hit enemies with this mace **all enemies in radius of 6 blocks** will be struck by lightning.

# **NEXT UPDATES:**

**1. Resoure pack (new texture for Lightning Mace)**

**2. New recipe (no spoilers)**

**3. New enchantments (for example more charges, bigger struck radius e.t.c)**
